item.description: A wave of Ukrainian drones targeted sites in St. Petersburg where Russian President Vladimir Putin is kicking off a closely-watched international summit. It comes after Ukraine suffered one of the worst onslaughts of the war. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Ukraine Hits St. Petersburg With Massive Wave of Drones
media:content.media:description: A wave of Ukrainian drones targeted sites in St. Petersburg where Russian President Vladimir Putin is kicking off a closely-watched international summit. It comes after Ukraine suffered one of the worst onslaughts of the war. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

item.title: Ukraine Hits St. Petersburg With Massive Wave of Drones

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Kyle Stewart
item.description: The House offered a rare rebuke to President Donald Trump, passing a Democratic-led measure to end his war with Iran over objections from Republican leadership.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump has argued he doesn't need congressional approval for military action in Iran.

item.title: House votes to rebuke Trump over war with Iran

item.description: NBC News Chief Data Analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press NOW to break down the results of primary races across the nation and what Californians can expect on the ballot in the general election come November. KNBC-TV Political Reporter Conan Nolan analyzes the Los Angeles mayoral race.

media:content.media:title: Steve Kornacki breaks down California's ‘cliffhanger’ and the first Trump-backed candidate loss
media:content.media:description: NBC News Chief Data Analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press NOW to break down the results of primary races across the nation and what Californians can expect on the ballot in the general election come November. KNBC-TV Political Reporter Conan Nolan analyzes the Los Angeles mayoral race.

item.title: Steve Kornacki breaks down California's ‘cliffhanger’ and the first Trump-backed candidate loss

item.dc:creator: Jonathan Allen
item.description: Rep. Randy Feenstra conceded to businessman Zach Lahn in Iowa’s Republican primary for governor as party voters rejected President Donald Trump’s late endorsement in the race.

media:content.media:text: Syndication: The Des Moines Register
media:content.media:description: Iowa Republican gubernatorial candidate Zach Lahn speaks at the Republican Party of Polk County’s Lincoln Dinner in Des Moines on March 26.

media:content.media:text: Rep. Randy Feenstra
media:content.media:description: Iowa Republican gubernatorial candidate Zach Lahn speaks at the Republican Party of Polk County’s Lincoln Dinner in Des Moines on March 26.

media:content.media:text: Iowa State Auditor Rob Sand
media:content.media:description: Iowa Republican gubernatorial candidate Zach Lahn speaks at the Republican Party of Polk County’s Lincoln Dinner in Des Moines on March 26.

item.title: In Iowa primary for governor, Trump’s pick concedes to MAHA-backed candidate

item.description: SpaceX has filed for an initial public offering at a valuation of $1.77 trillion that could make founder and CEO Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. NBC News' Allie Canal has more.

media:content.media:title: SpaceX files for IPO in move that could make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire
media:content.media:description: SpaceX has filed for an initial public offering at a valuation of $1.77 trillion that could make founder and CEO Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. NBC News' Allie Canal has more.

item.title: SpaceX files for IPO in move that could make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire

item.description: David Rush, a CIA officer, was arrested after $40 million in gold bars was found at his home. Sources say Rush worked as a liaison to the Pentagon for a sensitive nuclear submarine program. NBC News' Courtney Kube explains.

media:content.media:title: CIA officer arrested with gold bars worked on Pentagon's nuclear program, sources say
media:content.media:description: David Rush, a CIA officer, was arrested after $40 million in gold bars was found at his home. Sources say Rush worked as a liaison to the Pentagon for a sensitive nuclear submarine program. NBC News' Courtney Kube explains.

item.title: CIA officer arrested with gold bars worked on Pentagon's nuclear program, sources say

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: CBS News Editor-in-Chief Bari Weiss, speaking to network employees Wednesday about the firing of “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley, said newsroom leaders could not “find a way back” with the veteran journalist — a comment he flatly rejected in a statement of his own

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of Bari Weiss, left, and Scott Pelley
media:content.media:description: Bari Weiss; Scott Pelley.

item.title: CBS News’ Bari Weiss addresses ‘unfortunate’ firing of Scott Pelley

item.dc:creator: Rich Schapiro
item.description: It was one of the strangest Covid fraud cases brought by the Justice Department, with the kind of wild details that seemed ripped from a Hollywood script

media:content.media:text: The Edwards family, from left, son Josh, Pastor Evan, wife Mary Jane, and daughter Joy.
media:content.media:description: The Edwards family, from left, son Josh, Pastor Evan, wife Mary Jane, and daughter Joy.

media:content.media:text: Josh Edwards is taken into custody outside the Edwards family’s New Smyrna Beach home.
media:content.media:description: Josh Edwards is taken into custody outside the Edwards family’s home in New Smyrna Beach, Fla., on Dec. 14, 2022.

media:content.media:text: The family’s New Smyrna Beach house.
media:content.media:description: The family’s New Smyrna Beach house.

item.title: Florida pastor and son’s $8 million Covid fraud case comes to bizarre end

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: LONDON — A judge’s decision to spare three teenage boys found guilty of rape at knifepoint and other serious sexual offenses from a custodial sentence has sparked outrage across the U.K.

media:content.media:text: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

media:content.media:text: Jess Phillips visits West Midlands Police control room
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

media:content.media:text: Million Women Rise march in London
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

item.title: Decision to allow three boys convicted of rape to walk free sparks fury and debate in U.K.

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: Sahil Kapur previews the road ahead for congressional Republicans’ next reconciliation bill.

media:content.media:text: Thom Tillis 4/30/26
media:content.media:description: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C.

item.title: Senate Republicans move forward with their big immigration bill after internal clashes: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
Erick Mendoza
item.description: A man was charged Wednesday with assaulting five women in less than an hour at the University of California Los Angeles last month, officials said

media:content.media:text: UCLA campus pictures
media:content.media:description: School banners at UCLA in Westwood, Calif. on May 5.

item.title: Man found with zip ties and duct tape charged with assaulting 5 women at UCLA

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX announced Wednesday that it intends to make its stock market debut next week at a $1.77 trillion valuation.

media:content.media:text: SpaceX And T-Mobile Hold Joint Event In Texas
media:content.media:description: SpaceX founder Elon Musk during a T-Mobile and SpaceX joint an event in 2022.

item.title: SpaceX aims to make its stock market debut at $1.77 trillion value

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Kyle Stewart
item.description: The House offered a rare rebuke to President Donald Trump, passing a Democratic-led measure to end his war with Iran over objections from Republican leadership.

item.title: House votes to rebuke Trump over war with Iran

item.description: LONDON — A judge’s decision to spare three teenage boys found guilty of rape at knifepoint and other serious sexual offenses from a custodial sentence has sparked outrage across the U.K.

media:content.media:text: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

item.dc:creator: Andrew Blankstein
Doha Madani
item.description: San Francisco 49ers wide receiver Brandon Aiyuk was issued an arrest warrant in Northern California after he posted a video online that appears to show him driving at high speeds.

media:content.media:text: Super Bowl LVIII - San Francisco 49ers v Kansas City Chiefs
media:content.media:description: Brandon Aiyuk of the San Francisco 49ers in 2024.

item.title: San Francisco 49ers’ Brandon Aiyuk is issued arrest warrant after posting speeding video

item.dc:creator: Pilar Melendez
item.description: Moments before Santiago Campos took the stage at the News & Documentary Emmy Awards in New York City to accept a CBS News-funded scholarship in front of some of the most powerful people in TV news, veteran “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley took the time to offer the high school senior some advice.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of Scott Pelley, left, and Santiago Campos
media:content.media:description: Scott Pelley; Santiago Campos.

item.title: Student who called out CBS at News Emmys says Scott Pelley did the ‘right thing’

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
Jean Lee
item.description: Auburn University student James “Weston” Higginbotham went missing in Japan, with loved ones fearing he may be “emotionally distressed.”

media:content.media:text: Auburn University.
media:content.media:description: Auburn University in Auburn, Ala.

item.title: After Auburn student goes missing in Japan, family fears he’s ‘emotionally distressed’

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
item.description: A U.S.

media:content.media:text: Kerry Sheron, right, a Southern California man known for his patriotic and pro-Trump home decorations died after he was assaulted outside his house, authorities said.
media:content.media:description: Kerry Sheron, right, a Southern California man known for his patriotic and pro-Trump home decorations died after he was assaulted outside his house, authorities said.

item.title: Navy vet charged with murder after attack on man known for pro-Trump displays

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Andrew Greif
Tim Rohan
item.description: The NBA Finals are finally here, and what a matchup we have.

media:content.media:text: Aerial view of Tomas Hertl scoring a goal past other players on the ice
media:content.media:description: Tomas Hertl of the Vegas Golden Knights scores the eventual game winning goal past Frederik Andersen of the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period in Game One of the 2026 Stanley Cup Final at Lenovo Center on June 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Stephon Castle hangs from the basket after dunking
media:content.media:description: Tomas Hertl of the Vegas Golden Knights scores the eventual game winning goal past Frederik Andersen of the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period in Game One of the 2026 Stanley Cup Final at Lenovo Center on June 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: The Stanley Cup seen at center ice
media:content.media:description: Tomas Hertl of the Vegas Golden Knights scores the eventual game winning goal past Frederik Andersen of the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period in Game One of the 2026 Stanley Cup Final at Lenovo Center on June 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Charles De Ketelaere, left, and Luka Modric run on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Tomas Hertl of the Vegas Golden Knights scores the eventual game winning goal past Frederik Andersen of the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period in Game One of the 2026 Stanley Cup Final at Lenovo Center on June 2, 2026.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Vegas stuns Carolina in Game 1 to open Stanley Cup Final

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: We’re tracking the best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals live, including discounts on tech, home, beauty, kitchen products and more before the four-day sale begins.

media:content.media:text: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.
media:content.media:description: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.

media:content.media:text: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.
media:content.media:description: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.

item.title: The 51+ best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals you can shop now: Bissell, Le Creuset, Levi’s, and more (live updates)

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists share their product recommendations and shopping tips for supportive, comfortable insoles that can help with arch pain, plantar fasciitis and more.

media:content.media:text: According to the podiatrists we spoke to, over-the-counter insoles work best in sneakers.
media:content.media:description: According to the podiatrists we spoke to, over-the-counter insoles work best in sneakers.

media:content.media:text: According to the podiatrists we spoke to, over-the-counter insoles work best in sneakers.
media:content.media:description: According to the podiatrists we spoke to, over-the-counter insoles work best in sneakers.

item.title: The best insoles for your sneakers
